pwr: legacy Dell barrel · ~70W|>Pre-D-series family — search "Dell PA-9". Spares less common than the later 7.4mm standard. 💡 Buying tip: OEM preferred; this older family is scarcer, so prices vary more.

price_note: Est. (calibrated to Jul 2026 sold data). ARM discount — buyers fear x86 app compatibility; battery life is stellar.
note: First ARM mainstream Latitude. Windows on ARM: some x86 apps/dev tools run emulated or not at all — check your workflow first.
pwr: USB-C PD · 65W|>Any USB-C PD brick ≥65W works — ARM models sip power, even 45W is usually fine. 💡 Buying tip: used OEM ~$10–20, but for USB-C any solid-brand PD charger (Anker etc.) is equally fine — the standard does the work. ⚠ Basic phone USB-C chargers (5–20W) don't have enough power — you need a laptop-class 45–65W+ PD brick.

bat_note: Standard: 3-cell 40Wh (search JK6Y6). Same battery family as Inspiron 7300/Vostro 5300 — a 4-cell ~53Wh sibling fits; some units carry it (owner-verified via HWiNFO). Real-world: ~7–8h on 40Wh, ~9–10h on 53Wh.
